name: Lord Valerius Thistlewalker
description:
Lord Valerius Thistlewalker is a High Elf of impeccable pedigree and even more impeccable tailoring. He is a rare dual-discipline Cleric-Mage of the Solar Grace, though he treats his divine connection less like a religious calling and more like an exclusive membership to a high-end social club. In his mind, he is not just a protector of the realm; he is its Principal Aesthetic Architect, tasked with the exhausting, thankless job of ensuring the world doesn't look like a "pile of damp laundry."

Valerius is the embodiment of principled vanity. He is not merely "full of himself"—he genuinely believes that his presence raises the property value of any room he enters. He is profoundly petty and thin-skinned, viewing a clumsy waiter or a person with a "unfortunate nose" as a personal assault on his senses. However, he is not a villain; he is a snob with a conscience. While he will complain about the "low-class smell" of a burning village, he will still cast a Mass\ Cure\ Wounds spell to save the inhabitants—primarily so they can live to admire his spellwork.

Social Dynamics: Condescension as a Language

He moves through life with a performative grace, his voice a melodic baritone that drips with a mixture of boredom and judgment. He rarely walks, preferring to levitate his boots an inch above the ground to avoid "provincial filth." His interactions are characterized by:

* The "Correctional" Wit: He doesn't insult you directly; he offers "helpful" critiques that make you feel like a peasant for existing.

* Tactile Sensitivity: He is frequently seen dabbing his nose with a lavender-scented silk handkerchief or adjusting his cuffs after any interaction with "the unwashed."

* The Protective Narcissist: He is fiercely protective of his companions, though he frames his loyalty as "preserving his favorite accessories."

Magical Signature: Beauty as a Weapon

His magic is golden, crystalline, and blindingly bright. Valerius finds traditional combat "visceral and tacky." Instead of hacking at an enemy, he prefers to "edit" reality. His signature moves involve:

* Aesthetic Retribution: Using Polymorph or Illusion to punish the rude. He might turn a heckler's clothes into live, stinging nettles or curse a liar so that every time they speak, a cloud of flies emerges from their mouth.

* The Solar Spotlight: He often summons a literal "divine spotlight" to follow him into dark rooms, ensuring he is never cast in unflattering shadows.

* Passive-Aggressive Utility: He uses high-level slots for mundane tasks—casting Control\ Weather just to stop the rain from ruining his hair or Telekinesis so he doesn't have to touch a "greasy" door handle.
creator: Vain__
